emails.subject: Data Room
emails.body: Data Room Rod, I just spoke with Jayshree. Jeff has requested that we have a data room by tomorrow night and I was wondering who I should I should contact in legal to coordinate this effort. Let me know Thanks Sarah

emails.subject: Re: Data Room
emails.body: Re: Data Room We are also doing a due diligence all day thursday with dynegy on NNG Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: RE: Data Room
emails.body: RE: Data Room Rod and crew, In speaking with Jayshree, I think Mitch and Jeff would like to divide the information into categories i.e legal information (environmental disclosures, etc.) regulatory information, financial/accounting (I think we have a lot of this and I will try to get it organized), any relevant tax information, etc. I know this is a lot but let me know what you think, who I should coordinated with, etc. Thanks Sarah

emails.subject: RE: Data Room
emails.body: RE: Data Room Rod and crew, In speaking with Jayshree, I think Mitch and Jeff would like to divide the information into categories i.e legal information (environmental disclosures, etc.) regulatory information, financial/accounting (I think we have a lot of this and I will try to get it organized), any relevant tax information, etc. I know this is a lot but let me know what you think, who I should coordinated with, etc. Thanks Sarah

emails.subject: RE: Data Room
emails.body: I think you need to coordinate with Kevin Howard and Drew Fossum. I will be out of the office tomorrow.
